extract: Jubilife City (Japanese: コトブキシティ Kotobuki City) is a city in the Sinnoh region. Jubilife is the most modernized city in the region, and according to the animated series, the largest city in Sinnoh. It is the sixth-largest city in the Pokémon world. The city can be accessed from all four directions, with a gate occupying the west entrance. There are many distinctive buildings in Jubilife City, including the TV station (where Mystery Gift can be unlocked), the Pokétch Company, the Trainers' School, and the Global Trade Station/Global Wonder Station, which allows players to trade Pokémon with anyone across the entire world. In the past, back when the Sinnoh region was still known as Hisui, Jubilife City was called Jubilife Village, making it the oldest known settlement to still exist in the region.
